l1: Are users in a trusted forest completely unable to access resources in the trusting domain?

trust_password_out_of_sync.title: Remediating Cross-Forest Access Failure Caused by Trust Password Mismatch Errors

steps.expect: Returns error message indicating 'The trust password between this domain and the trusted domain is failed'
Logs systemic error code 1787 or 1326 tracking secure channel operational failure states
Resets the shared secret key symmetrically across both environment endpoints cleanly
Returns validation status success string, restoring cross-forest authentication access pathways
